title: Per-Origin Politeness, Concurrency, Retry Classification, and Adaptive Rate · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved crawl trace contains one plausible authorization, URL, robots, HTTP, decoding, parser, selector, frontier, concurrency, metadata, accessibility, privacy, export, browser, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in per-origin politeness and retry controller and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.
Limit active work per origin and globally while accounting for redirects, browser resources, retries, and queued fairness.
Retry only transient, safe, replayable failures under an attempt and elapsed-time budget and stop on denial or policy signals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Adaptive Rate Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: scraper-adaptive-rate-evidence-6gqyaz" that uses case 8011 to validate per-origin spacing, concurrency, transient retry, Retry-After, jitter, and adaptive rate evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not open sockets, resolve DNS, contact sites, import or claim native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, or Playwright behavior, read or write host files, use credentials, launch browsers, schedule host jobs, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, load, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, the recorded stable package versions, fixed and malformed fixtures, fake transports, controlled local servers, authorized disposable target sites, representative browser profiles, privacy, security, accessibility and legal review, load, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Adaptive Rate Evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Adaptive Rate Evidence into observable performance evidence. For Authorized crawling and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Adaptive Rate Evidence, keep Adaptive Rate Evidence connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-adaptive-rate-evidence-6gqyaz
# Competency: scraper-adaptive-rate-evidence.
# Case 8011: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def evidence_scraper_adaptive_rate_evidence_6gqyaz(origins: int = 3, minimum_spacing_ms: int = 800, maximum_origin_concurrency: int = 2, retry_budget: int = 3, policy_violations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_6gqyaz = "6gqyaz-zayqg6-8011"
    assert evidence_variant_6gqyaz
    evidence_axes_6gqyaz = (
        "authorization6gqyaz",
        "url8011",
        "responsezayqg6",
        "tree6gqyaz8011",
        "frontier80116gqyaz",
        "reportzayqg68011",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_6gqyaz)) == 6
    if origins < 1 or minimum_spacing_ms < 0:
        return False, origins, "politeness-shape"
    if maximum_origin_concurrency < 1 or maximum_origin_concurrency > 4:
        return False, maximum_origin_concurrency, "origin-concurrency"
    if retry_budget < 0 or retry_budget > 5:
        return False, retry_budget, "retry-amplification"
    if policy_violations > 0:
        return False, policy_violations, "politeness-violation"
    assert maximum_origin_concurrency <= 4 and policy_violations == 0
    return True, minimum_spacing_ms, "polite-origin-controller"
